name: Tetricon Minimalism
description: This is a classic puzzle game presented in a clean, minimalist style. The goal is simple and familiar: control the falling tetrominoes, fill horizontal lines to make them disappear, and prevent the blocks from reaching the top of the playing field. The pure design, free of unnecessary details, allows you to focus entirely on the gameplay.
instructions: Left Arrow A Move piece left Right Arrow D Move piece right Down Arrow S Soft drop accelerate fall Up Arrow W Rotate piece Spacebar Hard drop instant drop
tags: free html5 games for your website
